title: Auto Replant
description: Automatically replant harvested crops in Fabric. Saves time, respects survival gameplay, and supports configurable crop and tool rules.
body:
# Auto Replant Plus

Harvest crops without immediately doing the same boring click again.

Auto Replant Plus automatically replants supported crops when you harvest them, while still respecting normal survival gameplay rules like seed usage and configurable tool requirements.

## Features
- Automatically replants supported crops when harvested at full growth
- Supports the main vanilla farm crops
- Optional hoe requirement for balance
- Configurable crop whitelist
- Configurable replant delay
- Works naturally with survival inventory usage

## Why use it
- Faster farming loops
- Less repetitive harvesting
- Great for vanilla+ survival and SMP servers

## Config file
`config/autoreplantplus.json`

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
